title: cups-filters bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.28.7-22.0.1]
- header/footer not being printed in banner page. [Orabug: 28265099] (isaac.chen@oracle.com)
- Fixes [Orabug: 29163824] source indentation not following convention (isaac.chen@oracle.com)

[1.28.7-22]
- RHEL-65587 texttopdf omits Chinese characters when creating PDF documents

[1.28.7-21]
- RHEL-6519 RFE: Synchronize server defaults with clients
full_text:
[1.28.7-22.0.1]
- header/footer not being printed in banner page. [Orabug: 28265099] (isaac.chen@oracle.com)
- Fixes [Orabug: 29163824] source indentation not following convention (isaac.chen@oracle.com)

[1.28.7-22]
- RHEL-65587 texttopdf omits Chinese characters when creating PDF documents

[1.28.7-21]
- RHEL-6519 RFE: Synchronize server defaults with clients
